title: Uzo Odenigbo Highlights Nigerian Breweries Commitment to Sustainability and Growth - FinancialEDGE
description: Dr. Uzodinma Odenigbo, Corporate Affairs Director of Nigerian Breweries Plc, has reaffirmed the company commitment to sustainability and growth. He disclosed this in an engaged with stakeholders and the media in Lagos, while also reflecting on the company 79-year journey in Nigeria. According to him "We are committed to driving growth and sustainability in Nigeria,
html: Dr. Uzodinma Odenigbo, Corporate Affairs Director of Nigerian Breweries Plc, has reaffirmed the company commitment to sustainability and growth.
